solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def detectCapitalUse(self, word: str) -> bool:
        return word == word.upper() or word == word.lower() or word == word.capitalize()
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <The solution checks if the word is all uppercase, all lowercase, or follows the proper capitalization where only the first letter is uppercase. This is done using built-in string methods which are efficient and operate in linear time. The space complexity is constant as no additional space is used beyond the input.>
